title: Magnetic Stirrer w/Stir Bar, 2000mL Stir Plate, 2000RPM Magnetic Stir Plate, Magnetic Mixer White (NO Heating)
description:
SMALL SIZE, HIGH SPEED: Our magnetic stirrer is small, weighing only 5.6 ounces, but the stirring speed can reach a maximum of 2000RPM, and low-speed stirring is also stable.
CONVENIENT TO CARRY, EASY TO OPERATE: The magnetic stir plate comes with an adapter and a USB cable. You can either plug the adapter into a traditional socket or connect the USB cable to any USB port to start the device. It is convenient to carry and meet the needs of different scenes.
LARGE STIRRING CAPACITY: This mini stir plate can stir up to 68 ounces of low-viscosity liquids, which is very suitable for different stirring needs such as homemade yeast starter.
WIDELY USED: very suitable for stirring in fields such as scientific research, industry, agriculture, medicine, schools, and home brewing.
CONTACT US: Each magnetic mxier has undergone quality inspection. If there is any problem, you can easily contact the seller. The package includes a user manual, main unit, power adapter, and magnetic stirring bar.
reviews_5s:
Works greatWorks well, comes with 3/4" size magnet, but works well with all i have up to the 1 1/2".Just what I needed to keep my mycelium happyThis product is quality and I’m very pleased and would happily buy again.It stirs. Can't verify the RPM though. It's definitely not too fast at maximum power.Magnetic stirring appliance: This appears to be as advertised, works as I expected. No complaints so far, I’ll see how long it lasts!I recently purchased the ANZESER Mini Magnetic Stirrer and have been thoroughly impressed. The build quality is solid, and it feels durable enough to handle frequent use. The compact design is a huge plus, as it doesn’t take up much space and is easy to store when not in use.

As someone who uses it for mixology, it’s been a game changer. It mixes liquids efficiently, and the 2000mL capacity is more than enough for my needs. The maximum speed of 2000RPM ensures smooth, quick mixing without any issues.

It’s also incredibly user friendly setup is straightforward, and the included stir bar and retriever make the process seamless. Whether you’re into brewing or mixing, this stirrer delivers excellent performance.

Overall, it’s great value for money and performs as advertised. I highly recommend it to anyone in need of a reliable magnetic stirrer for a variety of uses.コンパクトで使いやすい。それまでシェイカーで混ぜていましたが手間から解放されました。混ざるまでの時間は掛かりますが、その間他のことができるので重宝しています。気を抜くと攪拌子を無くしそうです。The stirrer comes with a stirring bar (small white plastic bar with magnet inside), power adapter (plugs into the mains) and a retriever (small black, looks like a cleudo piece). It's easy to control with a round dial - the instructions state to start at a slow speed and gradually increase this. Stirring requires a flat bottomed container - not having a lab measuring beaker, the only one I could think of with a completely flat bottom was a glass measuring jug, but as mine is currently used for soap making I decided to try an ordinary glass beaker, with a not 100% flat bottom (but which is stable on a level surface).

I find stirring difficult, especially for prolonged periods, so was keen to try this. Initially undecided about whether to designate it for hobby (eg resin colouring, silicone mould making and dye mixing), or food use, I decided to test it out with water and food colouring dye. As you can hopefully see in the video, the dye stirs into the liquid very quickly - my first attempt, at a lower speed, was so fast that I had to make a second video! It can also be used for stirring powders into liquids, and for volumes up to 2000ml.

The small plastic stirring rod whizzes around 'on the spot' in the centre of the machine's surface, creating a vortex, spinning faster with a larger vortex if the speed is increased. It's a cold stirrer, so doesn't heat things up at the same time, but you could always heat them (eg. in the microwave) afterwards. For the price I think it's an impressive magnetic stirrer, which can be used in brewing, cocktail making, yoghurt making and many other applications.
reviews_1s: Not powerful enough to stir more than3oz of water definately not for epoxy resin which is what I was searching for when I found this
